title: Isles of Magic
description: Floating islands full of mysterious magic.
body:
*You find yourself in a world that is definitely not your own, one with magical suspended islands, monsters, and abilities. You don't know how or why he sent you here, but you must survive long enough to find out.* ![Amethyst Imbuement Table surrounded by bookshelves and wands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d719cf3ce543ec59969f2f110f6b15308ecaf1c8.png) # About This modpack focuses less on the technical aspects of Minecraft and leans more heavily into the fantasy and exploration side of things. With the [Ecospherical Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecospherical-expansion) mod, the Minecraft world has been transformed into a series of islands floating in the air! On top of this, mods such as [Amethyst Imbuement](https://modrinth.com/mod/amethyst-imbuement) and [Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) add new magical elements for you to play with! # Quests A progression system is in the works which uses quests as tutorials and milestones for players to learn about the mods included in the pack while not restricting them to follow only the quest line. Currently there are roughly **50 quests** ranging from exploration to magic. There are plans for more quests that go more in depth into the mid and late game in the future. If you have any recomendations for quests, hit me up via the discord server! ## Resources Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/7386fZtkWe) to **report bugs**, **make suggestions**, **request support**, or **see what's being worked on**! ## Mod List
